findings.message: The double-focus fix mapping is incomplete. BookingSearchTable.tsx L278 and L355 still contain the broken focus-visible:focus: pattern, but TASK-01 fix list only covers OpeningFloatModal, TenderRemovalModal, FinancialTransactionSearch, FinancialTransactionAuditSearch, and Login.
Validation commands are unscoped (pnpm typecheck/lint) instead of scoped (pnpm --filter reception typecheck/lint).
Test gate is underspecified — repo policy requires tests run in CI only, but plan says 'Existing tests still pass' without specifying push+CI-watch step.
